name: Hampton Financial Corporation
summary: Hampton Financial Corporation, through its subsidiary, Hampton Securities Limited, provides investment advisory and brokerage services. It offers wealth management services for private clients, as well as personal investing, financial instruments, insurance and estate planning, investment banking, institutional sales and trading, and capital market services; and corporate insurance agency services. Hampton Financial Corporation was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada. Hampton Financial Corporation is a subsidiary of Deeb & Company Limited.
